title: mSigSDK analysis report
description: Structured report object returned by reports.createAnalysisReport in mSigSDK v0.3. Required fields define the portable report contract; optional fields may be null when a workflow did not produce that evidence.

schemaVersion.description: Required. Stable schema identifier for the report contract.

version.description: Required. Semantic mSigSDK report format version represented by this schema.

generatedAt.description: Required. ISO 8601 timestamp for report generation.

workflowRole.description: Optional. Workflow role label such as signature_fitting, extraction, or schema_validation.

scopeStatement.description: Optional. Interpretation scope and boundary statement.

methodBasis.description: Optional. Method metadata, assumptions, and references supporting the analysis.

primaryInterpretationFields.description: Required. Dot-path labels for fields intended to support primary interpretation.

reproducibilityStatement.description: Required. Text describing provenance and reproducibility boundaries.

parameters.description: Required. Analysis parameters needed to reproduce the report.

signatures.description: Optional. Signature matrix summary or workflow-specific signature descriptor.

exposures.description: Optional. Exposure matrix summary or workflow-specific exposure descriptor.

extraction.description: Optional. De novo extraction result or summary.

provenance.description: Optional. Runtime, input, code, and environment provenance.

citations.description: Required. Citation strings or structured citation records.

notes.description: Required. Free-text caveats, user notes, or workflow notes.
